message:
feat(syscall): add io_uring, landlock, scheduling wrappers and migrate 22 callsites

Add wrappers for io_uring_setup/enter/register, kcmp, ioprio_set/get,
userfaultfd, sync_file_range, remap_file_pages, sched_setattr/getattr,
quotactl, lookup_dcookie, perf_event_open, add_key/request_key/keyctl,
statfs/fstatfs, landlock_create/add/restrict. Reduced libc::syscall
count 61→39 (36% reduction this batch).

EPIC: bd-h5x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
